history.qwen_observation: The lombok version bump triggered a MapStruct annotation processor conflict ('Attempt to recreate a file for type ContactMaskerImpl') during compilation.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the harmful Lombok bump step unblocks the migration chain; the MapStruct/Lombok annotation processor conflict can be addressed later or may resolve once the build targets Java 21 with updated plugins.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed with FilerException during MapStruct/Lombok annotation processing, indicating a processor conflict when generating ContactMaskerImpl.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding the lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency coordinates the annotation processors, resolving the duplicate file generation error and allowing the build to succeed before proceeding to Java 21 upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: Step 1 failed with a MapStruct FilerException when adding lombok-mapstruct-binding, indicating a classpath or scope conflict rather than a missing dependency.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the problematic dependency addition unblocks the initial compilation. Proceeding directly with plugin and build upgrades allows the migration to continue; if annotation processor conflicts reappear, they can be targeted specifically in subsequent iterations.
